description: IP SI Chickasha Indian Territory Saturday Evening September 30 1905 NUMBER 233 i L I iliriSiUDHElEU 160 acres Fine Washita Valley Land for Rent All in good cultivation and adjoining the city j P j Mff IftSflf III IIS OPPOSED BY UNION flEf THE StQUOYAH CONSTITUTION HAS STIRRED UP A FIGHT AMONG ORGANIZED LABOR OBJECT TO THE OPEN SHOP Separate SUIcri Realize That They have A Fight on Hands shall be made between the employ ment of union and nonunion labor in the proposed state which prac tically declares for the open shop policy and means the destruction of organized labor within the bornds of the Indian Territory if it be comes law The union leaders are already applying the name scab constitution to theSequoyah docu ment which in itself is sufficient to arouse the animosity of many union men against it INDIAN TERRITORY BAPTISTS Muskogee I T Spt 29The fight which was inaugurated against the constitution of the pro posed state of Sequoyah by the la Iwr organization of Muskogee is to be carried into every section of the United States The latjor unions j of Indian Territory are sending out thousands of letters to central labot organizations in
